section.heading: Termination and evaluation

content.p: The demonstration program under this subchapter shall terminate not less than 2 and not more than 5 years after the date on which the demonstration program is commenced.

subsection.heading: Evaluation
subsection.chapeau: Not later than 6 months after the termination of the demonstration program under this subchapter, the Secretary shall submit to the Congress a final report, which shall include—

paragraph.content: an evaluation 11 So in original. Probably should be followed by “of”. the effectiveness of the activities carried out under the demonstration program; and
any findings and recommendations of the Secretary for any appropriate legislative action.

section.sourceCredit: (Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 896, title IV, § 410, as added Pub. L. 105–276, title V, § 561, Oct. 21, 1998, 112 Stat. 2624.)
